answer_en:
Inferior Pharyngeal Constrictor m.
Origin: Oblique line and inferior horns of thyroid cartilage, and lateral aspect of cricoid cartilage
Insertion: Pharyngeal raphe*
*Cricopharyngeal part encircles pharyngo-esophageal junction without forming a raphe
